channel.title: Excel on O.R. in Action
channel.description: Recent content in Excel on O.R. in Action

item.title: Apache POI - Excel
item.author: kunlei1987@gmail.com (Kunlei Lian)
item.description: I recently worked on a project that required me to interact with Microsoft Excel to obtain input data and present optimization results. It turns out that there is a great package for that purpose and all you need to do is include the following dependencies in the Java project .pom file: 1<dependency> 2 <groupId>org.apache.poi</groupId> 3 <artifactId>poi</artifactId> 4 <version>3.17</version> 5</dependency> 6 7<dependency> 8 <groupId>org.apache.poi</groupId> 9 <artifactId>poi-ooxml</artifactId> 10 <version>3.17</version> 11</dependency> There are things I do most frequently in my project:
